moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final 2026
moments.blurb: The biggest game in global football, the FIFA World Cup 2026 final, kicks off this Sunday, July 19th, in the US, Canada, and Mexico.

angles.name: Countdown to glory
angles.copy: Nine days until the world stops for the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final! Who are you backing to lift the trophy?

angles.name: Final preparations
angles.copy: It's all building to the big one! Less than two weeks until the World Cup Final. What's been your highlight of the tournament so far?

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The iconic Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals on Saturday and Sunday, July 11-12.

angles.name: Centre Court Showdown
angles.copy: Game, set, match! It's the Wimbledon Finals weekend. Who will be crowned champion on Centre Court?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream time
angles.copy: Dust off your whites and get ready for the ultimate tennis showdown. The Wimbledon finals are here!

moments.title: The Open Championship begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, tees off at Royal Birkdale next Thursday, running until July 19th.

angles.name: Major Golf Action
angles.copy: Fore! The Open Championship returns next week at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick to win the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Links Golf Glory
angles.copy: The world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale for The Open next week. Get ready for some links course drama!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Day
moments.blurb: It's Friday, which means a new Official UK Singles Chart is announced today, revealing the nation's biggest hits.

angles.name: Chart Friday Vibes
angles.copy: New music Friday AND chart day! What tracks are you hoping to see climb the Official UK Singles Chart today?

angles.name: Who's #1?
angles.copy: The battle for the top spot is on! Tune in later to find out who's officially number one on the UK Singles Chart.

moments.title: Mavis Staples turns 87
moments.blurb: Legendary American gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, known for her powerful voice with The Staple Singers and her solo career, celebrates her 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mavis
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to the incredible Mavis Staples, who celebrates her 87th today! What's your favourite track from the queen of gospel and soul?

angles.name: A True Icon
angles.copy: From civil rights anthems to chart-topping hits, Mavis Staples has done it all. Happy 87th to a true music legend!

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Sir Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday this Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Dr. May
angles.copy: A very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Sir Brian May this Sunday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: From stadium anthems to astronomical achievements, Brian May is a true polymath. Wishing him a fantastic 79th this weekend!

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK start their long-awaited summer holidays next week, marking the official start of the summer break for families.

angles.name: School's Out for Summer
angles.copy: Freedom! For many, the summer holidays officially begin next week. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Road Trip Season
angles.copy: Get ready for the great escape! Summer holidays are kicking off for many families. Where's your favourite UK staycation spot?
